title: Korean-Style Pork Belly Ssäm
description: A deliciously sweet and spicy Korean-inspired pork belly dish, served with crispy kimchi slaw and cilantro.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together chili flakes, brown sugar, and 2 tablespoons of butter until smooth.
Rub the spice mixture all over the pork belly, making sure to coat it evenly.
Place the pork belly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
While the pork is baking, mix together ssamjang, sesame oil, and chili paste in a small bowl.
Once the pork is done baking, brush it with the ssamjang mixture and return it to the oven for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the pork from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Serve the pork with kimchi slaw, cilantro, and lime wedges on the side.
To make the kimchi slaw, mix together kimchi, 2 tablespoons of butter, and a pinch of salt in a bowl until well combined.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the slaw on the side of the pork and enjoy!
